stimulus:
[Bar graph: Top Four Species of Migratory Birds by Estimated Global Population]

  • European starling: 310 million
  • red-billed quelea: 1.5 billion
  • barn swallow: 290 million
  • common chaffinch: 130 million

Researchers estimated the global population, by species, of several common migratory birds. The team found that the species with the highest estimated global population is the ______
stem: Which choice most effectively uses data from the graph to complete the sentence?
rationale:
Choice C is correct because the graph shows that the red-billed quelea has an estimated global population of about 1.5 billion, far higher than any of the other three species listed.

Choice A is incorrect: the European starling has only about 310 million. Choice B is incorrect: the barn swallow has about 290 million. Choice D is incorrect: the common chaffinch has about 130 million, the lowest of the four.
